tests.name: Random Topology 2
tests.qemuCommand:
-M q35,cxl=on \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.0,bus_nr=12 \
    -device pxb-cxl,bus=pcie.0,id=cxl.1,bus_nr=13 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.0,port=0,id=rp-0.0,chassis=0,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.0,port=1,id=rp-0.1,chassis=0,slot=1 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=0,id=rp-1.0,chassis=1,slot=0 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=1,id=rp-1.1,chassis=1,slot=1 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=2,id=rp-1.2,chassis=1,slot=2 \
    -device cxl-rp,bus=cxl.1,port=3,id=rp-1.3,chassis=1,slot=3 \
    -device cxl-upstream,bus=rp-0.0,id=us0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=0,chassis=0,slot=0,id=sw0.0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=1,chassis=0,slot=1,id=sw0.1 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us0,port=2,chassis=0,slot=2,id=sw0.2 \
    -device cxl-switch-mailbox-cci,bus=us0,id=sw0-mailbox \
    -device cxl-upstream,bus=rp-0.1,id=us1 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us1,port=0,chassis=0,slot=0,id=sw1.0 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us1,port=1,chassis=0,slot=1,id=sw1.1 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us1,port=2,chassis=0,slot=2,id=sw1.2 \
    -device cxl-downstream,bus=us1,port=3,chassis=0,slot=3,id=sw1.3 \
    -device cxl-switch-mailbox-cci,bus=us1,id=sw1-mailbox \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-1.0,persistent-memdev=mem0,lsa=lsa-mem0,id=cxl-type3-dev-0,sn=0x938E9C79 \
    -device cxl-accel,bus=rp-1.3,volatile-memdev=mem-ac-0,id=cxl-ac-dev-0,sn=0x3A5D2089 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw0.0,volatile-memdev=mem1,id=cxl-type3-dev-1,sn=0x3AB2E8CE \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw0.2,persistent-memdev=mem2,lsa=lsa-mem2,id=cxl-type3-dev-2,sn=0x5FEB169D \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw1.0,persistent-memdev=mem3,lsa=lsa-mem3,id=cxl-type3-dev-3,sn=0x1F2CEDD5 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw1.1,volatile-dc-memdev=mem4,id=cxl-type3-dev-4,num-dc-regions=1,sn=0x6871C5F1 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw1.3,persistent-memdev=mem5,lsa=lsa-mem5,id=cxl-type3-dev-5,sn=0x146F3CF6 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-1.1,volatile-memdev=mem6,id=cxl-type3-dev-6,sn=0x70B0B002 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=rp-1.2,volatile-memdev=mem7,id=cxl-type3-dev-7,sn=0x67E4FDED \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw0.1,volatile-memdev=mem8,id=cxl-type3-dev-8,sn=0x02979E71 \
    -device cxl-type3,bus=sw1.2,volatile-memdev=mem9,id=cxl-type3-dev-9,sn=0x7BEFC668 \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem0,size=2G,mem-path=/tmp/mem0.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem0,size=8M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem0.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem-ac-0,size=512M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem1,size=256M \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem2,size=512M,mem-path=/tmp/mem2.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem2,size=16M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem2.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem3,size=1G,mem-path=/tmp/mem3.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem3,size=16M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem3.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem4,size=1G \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=mem5,size=1G,mem-path=/tmp/mem5.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-file,id=lsa-mem5,size=16M,mem-path=/tmp/lsa-mem5.bin,share=on \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem6,size=2G \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem7,size=512M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem8,size=512M \
    -object memory-backend-ram,id=mem9,size=2G
